title: Microsoft must face $2.8 billion UK lawsuit over cloud computing licences
summary: A London tribunal has allowed a mass lawsuit against Microsoft. Thousands of British businesses claim they were overcharged for Windows Server software. This software was used on cloud services from Amazon, Google, and Alibaba. The case, valued at up to $2.8 ​billion, will now proceed to trial.

title: Immigrants in a spot as US looks to vet old green card approvals
summary: USCIS director Joseph B Edlow this weekend said the agency will reopen old cases to vet Biden-era green cards for fraud. This comes amid tighter scrutiny of issuance of green cards and a rise in denial rates.

title: HCLTech Q4 net profit up 4.2% YoY to Rs 4,488 crore
summary: The HCLTech management attributed the subdued quarterly performance to macro-uncertainties clouding the tech investment landscape and said AI-led automation could impact FY27 revenues by 2-4% though the company is seeking to offset it through more projects.
